Features

Everything you need to stay compliant.

CARA handles the complexity of SA labour law so you don't have to.

Instant AI Advice

Ask CARA anything about SA labour law and get precise, practical guidance in seconds.

Document Generator

Warnings, suspension letters, CCMA responses, PIPs — generated instantly from your facts.

CCMA Deadline Tracker

Never miss a 30-day CCMA referral window. Automatic alerts keep you ahead.

Smart Wizards

Guided intake for every matter type — AWOL, hearings, retrenchments, grievances and more.

Risk Warnings

CARA flags high-risk actions before you make them — protecting you from costly CCMA losses.

Works on Any Device

Phone, tablet, desktop. Use it on the floor, in the office, or anywhere you need it.

SA Labour Law
Always current

How It Works

Describe your situation. Get the answer.

Tell CARA what's happening — she asks the right follow-up questions through a guided wizard, then gives you precise, actionable advice specific to your sector and employee.

  • Sector-specific advice for your business
  • Employee named and addressed directly
  • Documents ready to send immediately
  • Share via WhatsApp or email in one tap

Why iNRECO

Built for South African employers.

LRA & BCEA Compliant

Every response aligns with the Labour Relations Act, BCEA, and 2025 Code of Good Practice.

Risk Flagging

CARA warns you before you take an action that could cost you at the CCMA.

CARA Is Your Adviser

CARA is your always-on AI labour consultant — instant expert answers, not generic responses.

Affordable Subscriptions

From R259/month — less than one hour of a labour consultant's time.
